Building Your List During a Launch
Introduction
Bonus
Behind the scenes of how we build our list
during a launch with Facebook ads
• You already know that your audience is on
Facebook
• You have your offer ready to drive people to
• You have a budget for paid ads
• And you’re willing to take the time to learn Facebook
ads...
This is a more advanced topic that will be
valuable to you if…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 10 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
If you’re just getting started…
• You should learn Facebook ads yourself
• It’s not something we’re going to teach here in
PLF (how to set up Ads manager, create ads, etc.)
• Recommend you get training from Facebook –
they have great training on it
• If you have the bandwidth and time I recommend
you do it yourself
If you’re just getting started…
• If you have someone on your team that can learn
it – that’s another option
• At some point down the road, you might want to
think about hiring an expert
So now I want to take you behind the
scenes and show you step-by-step how we
run a Facebook ad campaign during our
launch…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 10 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
3 Phases for Facebook campaigns during a
launch
• Phase 1: Lead Generation
• Phase 2: Engagement
• Phase 3: Sales
Bonus
Building Your List During a Launch
Phase 1: Lead Generation
Getting Leads into our Funnel - Internally
• We create customized audiences and look-alike
audiences using:
• Our own subscriber list
• Our unsubscribe list
• People that have been engaged in the last 180
days
• Fans of our pages
• Visitors of our website
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 10 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Getting Leads into our Funnel - Externally
• We create look-alike audiences from:
• Fans/followers of other people in internet
marketing space
• Tool service providers (e.g. email hosting
companies)
Where we place our ads…
• Facebook network
• Audience network
• Instagram
• Most of our leads come in from the newsfeed on
mobile
How we target for lead gen…
• Focusing on two pieces of Prelaunch Content
• PLC 1
• PLC 3 (Launch Blueprint)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
